creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-01-05 08:44:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/florist-gpl    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/florist-gpl/files patch-Makefile.in patch-c-posix.c 
  Log:
  FLORIST is an implementation of the IEEE Standards 1003.5: 1992, IEEE
  STD 1003.5b: 1996, and parts of IEEE STD 1003.5c: 1998, also known as
  the POSIX Ada Bindings.
  
  WWW: http://libre.adacore.com/
  
  PR:             ports/107411
  Submitted by:   John Merryweather Cooper
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2579    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/florist-gpl/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +11 -0     ports/devel/florist-gpl/files/patch-c-posix.c (new)

  1.1       +195 -0    ports/devel/florist-gpl/pkg-plist (new)
